Climate Action.reason: Insurance is a key mechanism for strengthening financial resilience to climate-related disasters (Target 13.1), and this course covers its fundamental legal principles.

Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions.reason: As a law course focusing on 'handling insurance dispute cases', it directly promotes the rule of law and access to justice, core tenets of Target 16.3.
